title: Just 3D Potions (Punchy!)
body:
## Requires **[Punchy!](https://modrinth.com/project/8aoMKplv)** for custom first person animations of bottles!

![j](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/082dd2441fb57d87559d245ff2e510263ce6e71d.png)

## Requires [Respackpots](https://modrinth.com/project/TiF5QWZY) for variants of xp bottles.
### Recommend [Simply No Shading](https://modrinth.com/project/9gx5Xvc5) for better look of glass bottles.
